Portable magnetic non-slip easy-eject card wallet holder
This magnetic card wallet holder prevents misplaced items, and is ideal for commutes and travel. Rush service is available.

Crafted from eco-friendly PU leather with strong magnets, this iOS-exclusive wallet snaps securely, even stackable with clear/silicone cases and safe for credit cards. It features a user-friendly card ejection design: press the empty slot to push out up to 2 cards effortlessly, with a matte non-slip interior to prevent cards from falling. Beyond storage, it integrates with Find My: locate the wallet worldwide via your phone (with play-sound and directions features), plus a left-behind reminder that alerts you if the wallet is no longer detected nearby. Perfect for daily commutes (keeping cards accessible), travel (avoiding lost wallets), or busy routines (quick card access). And it keeps essentials organized and avoids misplaced items, fitting seamlessly into on-the-go lifestyles.
